g.text: WIRE SCHEDULE - PAGE 1: IGNITION COILS + FUEL INJECTORS
CUT# CIRCUIT ID M130 PIN DESTINATION AWG COLOR LENGTH NOTES
#13 INJ1 A19 Fuel Injector 1 18 GRN 4.6ft EV6/USCAR
#14 INJ2 A20 Fuel Injector 2 18 GRN/WHT 4.6ft EV6/USCAR
#15 INJ3 A21 Fuel Injector 3 18 GRN/BLK 4.6ft EV6/USCAR
#16 INJ4 A22 Fuel Injector 4 18 GRN/RED 4.6ft EV6/USCAR
#17 INJ5 A27 Fuel Injector 5 18 GRN/BLU 4.6ft EV6/USCAR
#18 INJ6 A28 Fuel Injector 6 18 GRN/YEL 4.6ft EV6/USCAR
#19 INJ7 A29 Fuel Injector 7 18 GRN/VIO 4.6ft EV6/USCAR
#20 INJ8 A30 Fuel Injector 8 18 GRN/ORG 4.6ft EV6/USCAR
16 WIRES ON THIS PAGE | 12 WIRES ON PAGE 2 (SENSORS + THROTTLE BODY)
1. ALL IGNITION COILS ARE ACDelco D510C (GM 12611424). 4-PIN PUSH-TO-SEAT CONNECTOR.
2. LS3 FIRING ORDER: 1-8-7-2-6-5-4-3. M130 IGN_LS1-LS8 MAP TO PHYSICAL COILS PER MOTEC M1 CONFIG.
3. COIL B+ (12V) AND GND ARE NOT FROM M130. COIL B+ IS SWITCHED VIA SEC 0 (POWER DIST). GND TO ENGINE STAR GROUND (SEC 12).
4. M130 PROVIDES ONLY THE IGN COMMAND (LOW-SIDE DRIVER). ONE WIRE PER COIL FROM ECU.
5. ALL INJECTORS ARE GM 12576341 (42 LB/HR EV6/USCAR). PEAK-AND-HOLD DRIVE FROM M130.
6. INJ_PH (PEAK-HOLD HIGH-SIDE) = M130 SOURCING PIN. INJ_LS (LOW-SIDE) = INTERNAL M130 RETURN (A23/A24).
7. EACH INJECTOR HAS 2 PINS: + (FROM M130 INJ_PH) AND - (TO M130 INJ_LS). ONLY 1 WIRE PER INJECTOR FROM ECU.
8. ALL WIRE LENGTHS ARE ESTIMATED (4.6ft ENGINE BAY). VERIFY ON VEHICLE BEFORE CUTTING.
9. INJECTOR PIGTAILS: ICT BILLET WPINJ40. COIL PIGTAILS: OEM D510C CONNECTOR.
SENSOR CIRCUITS (CKP, CMP, KS, MAP, IAT, CLT, OPS, FPS, OTS) -> SEE SEC 2, PAGE 2 (NKW-K5-02-2)
ELECTRONIC THROTTLE BODY (ETB) -> SEE SEC 2, PAGE 2 (NKW-K5-02-2)
COIL/INJ B+ POWER FEED -> SEE SEC 0, PAGE 1 (POWER DISTRIBUTION)
COIL/INJ GROUND RETURNS -> SEE SEC 12 (GROUND DISTRIBUTION)
M130 FULL PINOUT -> SEE SEC 3 (ECU - M130 PINOUT)
CAN BUS (M130:B17/B18) -> SEE SEC 11 (CAN BUS NETWORK)
